# Theodor W. Adorno

*1903 – 1969 · German*

German philosopher and sociologist of the Frankfurt School: with Horkheimer, in Dialectic of Enlightenment, he analyzes how Enlightenment reason, by becoming an instrument for dominating nature, turns into a new barbarism; theorist of a "negative dialectics" resistant to any reconciliation.

> Stub profile: only this mini-card exists so far; the sourced axis positions remain to be authored. Contributions welcome.
